# Shashi Kanth G S

Portfolio website for Shashi Kanth G S, Solution Architect focused on airline domain modernization, distributed systems, and applied AI.

## Primary Pages
- Home: https://shashikanth.me/
- Writing archive: https://shashikanth.me/blog

## Writing
- The Two Rails of Modern AI: https://shashikanth.me/blog/two-rails-of-modern-ai
- Build a Vendor-Neutral A2A Agent: https://shashikanth.me/blog/vendor-neutral-a2a-agent
- Turn GitHub Copilot into an A2A Agent: https://shashikanth.me/blog/github-copilot-as-a2a-agent
- AI-Assisted Infrastructure Management: https://shashikanth.me/blog/ai-assisted-infrastructure-management
